text: API requests use bearer tokens. Send the token in the Authorization header and rotate it every 90 days.
API requests use bearer tokens. Send the token in the Authorization header and rotate it every 90 days.
API calls use bearer tokens. Put the token in the Authorization header and rotate it every ninety days.
Retry failed requests with exponential backoff. Stop after five attempts and preserve the final error response.
The default rate limit is 120 requests per minute per workspace. Responses include the remaining request count.
